---
title: nietzsche und gesinnung
subtitle: rezeptionsästhetische corpusanalyse
date: "2026-06-08"
mdate: '`r format(Sys.time())`'
# # toc: true
# # toc-depth: 3
# # toc-expand: true
metadata-files:
  - _quarto-common-nietzsche.yml
title-meta: ""
# bibliography: nietzsche.bib
# # nocite: '@*'
---

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
{{< meta cmeta >}}
:::


{{< include _gitcom.qmd >}} 
::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}

-----

> [Nietzsche](nietzsche001.qmd) / mdl thesenpapier draft

-----

:::

```{r,echo=F,eval=T}
print("engine on...")
```

{{< include _ul-md/nietzsche/nietzsche-mdl-th.md >}}

# references
